personalInfo.bio: Brand designer with eight years of experience shaping visual identities for hospitality, beauty and lifestyle businesses. I blend strategy, typography and illustration to create work that feels memorable and commercially strong.

bullets: Led identity projects for boutique hotels, cafes and consumer brands across Europe.
Presented visual directions to clients and translated feedback into polished brand systems.
Mentored two junior designers and introduced a smoother review process.
Created campaign visuals, packaging concepts and social launch assets.
Worked closely with copywriters, photographers and print suppliers.
Helped redesign the studio portfolio presentation for new client pitches.

workSamples.title: Rivage Hotel Identity Refresh
workSamples.description: Refreshed the visual identity for a coastal boutique hotel, including logo refinements, signage guidance, menus, stationery and digital launch assets.

workSamples.title: Atelier Bloom Packaging Range
workSamples.description: Created a new packaging look for a natural skincare line with clearer shelf presence and a softer, more premium tone.
